heading: Omitted
label: 609a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted funds distributed to tribe members from Federal and State income taxes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–278, § 282 Stat. 69Mar. 30, 1968
